name: hcportal_test
description: Test/debug SP that retrieves the top 5 event names for a given kennel, ordered by event start date descending. No authentication — intentionally lightweight for testing.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Accepted but unused. The API shim always passes deviceId; this parameter prevents mapping errors.

parameters.name: publicKennelId
parameters.description: The public kennel ID to filter events by. Used to join Event to Kennel.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any runtime error. No auth or validation — only the CATCH block can produce this.

rowsets.name: EventNames
rowsets.description: Top 5 event names for the specified kennel, ordered by EventStartDatetime descending. Empty rowset if @publicKennelId is NULL or matches no kennel.

columns.name: EventName
columns.description: The name of the event from HC.Event

breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
